subject: A muscular fighter in an orange gi and dark belt stands holding a large cloth sack, depicted in a confident relaxed pose against a bright dynamic background
description: A muscular humanoid figure in a bright orange gi with dark belt stands facing forward in a relaxed confident pose, one hand raised slightly and the other gripping a large cloth sack. The hair is dark and distinctively spiky. The background features warm gold and yellow energy radiating outward suggesting a scene of power or significance. The composition is a mid-shot with the full upper body visible. The face has a calm, friendly expression.
foreground: Muscular fighter in orange gi holding a cloth sack, relaxed forward-facing pose
